scripts.agent:eval: uv run python -c "from server.evals.harness import main; raise SystemExit(main())"
scripts.build:serve: DARKTABLE_SKIP_CONFIG=1 DARKTABLE_INSTALL=0 npm run darktable:build && DARKTABLE_RUN_FROM_BUILD_DIR=1 npm run darktable:start && npm run server:start
scripts.darktable:build-and-start: npm run darktable:build && npm run darktable:start
